content.text:
Perfect! Now let me create a comprehensive summary document. Let me compile all the information:

## COMPREHENSIVE CODEBASE SUMMARY - Small World Assist

### PROJECT OVERVIEW

**Small World Assist** is an AI music manager web app for independent artists. It's a mobile-first, dark-themed, subscription-based application built with React, TypeScript, Vite, and Supabase.

**Project Root:** `/Users/jonathanferreira/Documents/app_projects/sw-assist`

---

## 1. DIRECTORY STRUCTURE

```
sw-assist/
├── src/
│   ├── assets/           # Static assets
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── ui/          # Base UI components (Button, Input, Textarea)
│   │   └── layout/      # Layout components (AppShell, BottomNav)
│   ├── hooks/           # React hooks (useAuth, useColorExtractor)
│   ├── lib/             # Utilities & constants (supabase, utils, constants)
│   ├── pages/           # Page components organized by feature
│   │   ├── auth/        # SignUp, Login
│   │   ├── dashboard/   # Dashboard
│   │   ├── onboarding/  # Onboarding flow + steps
│   │   ├── artist-page/ # PageEditor (link editor)
│   │   ├── epk/         # EpkEditor
│   │   └── public/      # Public pages (ArtistPage, EpkPage)
│   ├── types/           # TypeScript types (database.ts)
│   ├── App.tsx          # Main app with routing
│   ├── main.tsx         # React entry point
│   └── index.css        # Tailwind + theme CSS
├── supabase/
│   ├── migrations/      # SQL migrations (8 files)
│   └── functions/       # Edge functions (TypeScript/Deno)
│       ├── track-page-event/
│       └── suggest-epk-headline/
├── public/              # Empty; no static assets
├── .github/workflows/   # GitHub Actions (PR assistant, code review)
├── package.json         # Dependencies
├── vite.config.ts       # Vite configuration
├── tsconfig.json        # TypeScript config (references app + node configs)
├── tsconfig.app.json    # App TypeScript config
├── tsconfig.node.json   # Node TypeScript config
├── .env.local          # Supabase env vars (not in repo)
└── .gitignore          # Git ignore rules
```

---

## 2. DEPENDENCIES (package.json)

**Key Dependencies:**
- **React & DOM:** `^19.2.0` — UI library
- **React Router DOM:** `^7.13.1` — Client-side routing
- **Supabase JS:** `^2.97.0` — Backend client
- **Tailwind CSS:** `^4.2.1` — Styling via @tailwindcss/vite
- **Lucide React:** `^0.575.0` — Icon library
- **ColorThief:** `^3.0.0` — Extract dominant colors from images (via `getPaletteSync` named export)
- **clsx & tailwind-merge:** Class name utilities
- **Vite:** `^7.3.1` — Build tool
- **TypeScript:** `~5.9.3` — Type checking

**Dev Dependencies:** ESLint, TypeScript ESLint, @types packages, Vite plugins

---

## 3. CONFIGURATION FILES

### **vite.config.ts**
- Plugins: `react()` and `tailwindcss()` (no tailwind.config.js needed)
- Tailwind v4 uses `@theme` block in `src/index.css`

### **tsconfig.app.json**
- Target: ES2022
- Module: ESNext
- Strict mode enabled
- JSX: react-jsx
- Includes: `src/` only

### **tsconfig.node.json**
- Target: ES2023
- For build tooling only
- Includes: `vite.config.ts`

---

## 4. DESIGN SYSTEM (src/index.css)

**Tailwind v4 Theme Variables** (no tailwind.config.js):
- **Backgrounds:** `--color-black: #0a0a0a`, `--color-surface: #141414`, `--color-surface-raised: #1c1c1c`
- **Accent:** `--color-accent: #7c3aed` (electric violet), `--color-accent-hover: #6d28d9`, `--color-accent-subtle: #1e1030`
- **Text:** `--color-text-primary: #f5f5f5`, `--color-text-secondary: #a3a3a3`, `--color-text-muted: #525252`
- **Borders:** `--color-border: #2a2a2a`, `--color-border-subtle: #1f1f1f`
- **Status:** `--color-success: #22c55e`, `--color-warning: #f59e0b`, `--color-error: #ef4444`
- **Radius:** `--radius-sm: 8px`, `--radius-md: 12px`, `--radius-lg: 16px`, `--radius-xl: 24px`, `--radius-full: 9999px`
- **Fonts:** `--font-display: Satoshi`, `--font-body: Inter`

---

## 5. ROUTE DEFINITIONS (src/App.tsx)

```
Public Routes:
  /signup                    → SignUp page
  /login                     → Login page
  /:artistSlug/:pageSlug/epk → Public EPK page (must come before artist page route)
  /:artistSlug/:pageSlug     → Public Artist Page

Protected Routes (inside AppShell with BottomNav):
  /dashboard                 → Dashboard (post-onboarding home)
  /page                      → PageEditor (link/artist page editor)
  /epk                       → EpkEditor (press kit editor)
  /analytics                 → ComingSoon placeholder
  /profile/edit              → EditProfile (full profile editor)

Onboarding (protected, no BottomNav):
  /onboarding                → 4-step wizard

Root Redirect:
  /                          → /signup (no user)
                             → /onboarding (not onboarded)
                             → /dashboard (done onboarding)

Catch-all: * → /
```

**Route Guards:**
- `ProtectedRoute` — redirects to /login if no authenticated user
- `OnboardingGuard` — redirects to /dashboard if `profile.onboarding_completed === true`

---

## 6. PAGES & FEATURES

### **Auth Pages** (`src/pages/auth/`)

**SignUp.tsx**
- Email + password form
- Posts to `supabase.auth.signUp()`
- On success → navigate to `/onboarding`
- Shows error messages

**Login.tsx**
- Email + password form
- Posts to `supabase.auth.signInWithPassword()`
- On success → navigate to `/dashboard`
- Shows error messages

---

### **Onboarding** (`src/pages/onboarding/`)

**Onboarding.tsx** (main)
- Manages 4-step state machine with `OnboardingData` interface
- Steps: 1) Basic Info, 2) Bio & Photo, 3) Links, 4) Goals
- Progress bar shows completion (0-100%)
- On finish: updates profile row, inserts links, navigates to /dashboard
- Persists to DB immediately (no draft state)

**Steps:**
- **StepBasicInfo** — artist_name, real_name, location, genre (up to 3)
- **StepBioPhoto** — bio textarea, profile photo upload to `profile-assets/{userId}/profile.{ext}`
- **StepLinks** — preset platforms (Spotify, Apple Music, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube) + custom links
- **StepGoals** — primary_goal, career_stage, release_timeline, monthly_listeners_target

---

### **Dashboard** (`src/pages/dashboard/Dashboard.tsx`)

- Header: profile photo, artist name, genre tags, sign-out button
- AI Briefing card (placeholder) — "Connect Spotify" CTA
- 4 pillar grid: Artist Page, EPK, Analytics, Opportunities
- All pillars link to their editor pages

---

### **Profile Editor** (`src/pages/profile/EditProfile.tsx`)

- Sticky header with back button, "Save" status indicator
- Photo upload (stores to `profile-assets`)
- Identity section: artist name, real name, location, genre chips
- Story section: bio textarea
- Links section: preset platform chips + URL inputs + custom links
- Goals section: primary goal, career stage, release timeline, monthly listeners target
- Delete all links + re-insert pattern on save
- Calls `refreshProfile()` after save to sync global state

---

### **Artist Page Editor** (`src/pages/artist-page/PageEditor.tsx`) [100 lines shown]

- Edits the public profile page (`/:slug/:pageSlug`)
- Manages links with visibility toggle, drag-to-reorder
- Odesli API integration for song.link detection
- Search + bulk add functionality
- Platform-specific icons (TikTok custom SVG, Lucide icons for others)

---

### **Public Artist Page** (`src/pages/public/ArtistPage.tsx`) [100 lines shown]

- Accessible at `/:artistSlug/:pageSlug`
- Shows: profile photo, artist name, bio, genre tags, banner image
- Color extraction from profile photo via `useColorExtractor` → dynamic theme
- Link sections: streaming (main buttons) + social (icon row)
- Tracking integration: visit creation, event logging, link clicks
- No auth required

---

### **EPK Editor** (`src/pages/epk/EpkEditor.tsx`) [100 lines shown]

- Edits press kit content
- Headline: manual input + "Generate with AI" button (calls suggest-epk-headline function)
- Bio override
- Tracks: add/edit/delete music (title, streaming_url, release_date, is_featured, is_on_epk)
- Shows: add/edit/delete live dates (venue, city, date, ticket_url, is_headline)
- Press photos: up to 6 slots, upload to `press-photos/{userId}/photo-{index}.{ext}`
- Stats snapshot: key-value pairs (monthly_listeners, spotify_followers, etc.)
- Public URL display + copy-to-clipboard
- Delete all tracks/shows + re-insert pattern on save

---

### **Public EPK Page** (`src/pages/public/EpkPage.tsx`) [100 lines shown]

- Accessible at `/:artistSlug/epk`
- Fetches profile, epk, tracks (is_on_epk=true), shows (upcoming)
- Displays: headline, bio, stats grid (colored by platform), press photos gallery
- Tracks list with featured star badge
- Upcoming shows list (shows where date >= today + is_visible=true)
- Stats colors: Spotify green (#1DB954), Instagram pink (#E4405F), TikTok turquoise (#25F4EE), YouTube red (#FF0000)

---

## 7. UI COMPONENTS (`src/components/`)

### **ui/Button.tsx**
- Props: `variant` (primary/secondary/ghost), `size` (sm/md/lg), `loading` (shows spinner), disabled
- Rounded-full design, focus rings, active scale animation
- Primary: accent bg, hover darker
- Secondary: surface bg, border, accent hover
- Ghost: text color, hover bg

### **ui/Input.tsx**
- Props: label, error, hint, all HTML input attributes
- Rounded-xl, border, focus border accent
- Error state turns border red
- Label + optional hint/error text below

### **ui/Textarea.tsx**
- Similar to Input but for textarea
- Label, error, hint
- resize-none (no manual resize)

### **layout/AppShell.tsx**
- Wrapper for protected pages with BottomNav
- Outlet for page content
- Footer padding for safe area (iOS home indicator)

### **layout/BottomNav.tsx**
- 5 tabs: Home (/dashboard), Page (/page), EPK (/epk), Analytics (/analytics), Profile (/profile/edit)
- Icons from Lucide, custom style based on active route
- Fixed bottom, safe area spacer for mobile

---

## 8. HOOKS (`src/hooks/`)

### **useAuth.ts**
- Returns: `{ session, user, profile, loading, signOut, refreshProfile }`
- Subscribes to Supabase auth state changes
- Auto-fetches profile on session init + auth changes
- `refreshProfile()` — re-fetch profile from DB (call after mutations)
- `signOut()` — Supabase sign out

### **useColorExtractor.ts**
- Takes imageUrl string
- Returns: `{ colors: [primaryColor, secondaryColor], loading }`
- Uses `colorthief.getPaletteSync(img, { colorCount: 2 })`
- Fallback colors: `["#7c3aed", "#1e1030"]` (accent + accent-subtle)
- Handles CORS, image load errors gracefully

---

## 9. LIB UTILITIES & CONSTANTS (`src/lib/`)

### **supabase.ts**
- Creates Supabase client: `createClient<any>(url, anonKey)`
- Env vars: `VITE_SUPABASE_URL`, `VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` (from .env.local)
- Typed as `any` for now; can swap in generated types once available

### **utils.ts**
- `cn(...inputs)` — clsx + tailwind-merge combo
- `slugToTitle(slug)` — "custom-link" → "Custom Link"
- `toBaseSlug(artistName)` — normalize to lowercase, hyphenated, alphanumeric
- `generateUniqueSlug(artistName, userId)` — async; queries DB to avoid collisions, appends -2, -3, etc.

### **constants.ts**
- `GENRES` — 33 genre strings (Hip-Hop, R&B, Pop, Rock, etc.)
- `PLATFORM_PRESETS` — 5 streaming platforms (Spotify, Apple Music, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube)
- `PRIMARY_GOALS` — 6 career goals
- `CAREER_STAGES` — 4 stages (just_starting, building, established, scaling)
- `RELEASE_TIMELINES` — 4 options (asap, 1_3_months, 3_6_months, no_release)
- `ODESLI_PLATFORM_MAP` — maps song.link platforms to internal platform keys
- `SOCIAL_PLATFORMS` — Set of social platforms (Instagram, TikTok, Twitter, Facebook)
- `PLATFORM_LABELS` — display labels for all platforms

---

## 10. DATABASE TYPES (`src/types/database.ts`)

**Subscription Types:**
```typescript
type SubscriptionTier = 'free' | 'rising' | 'indie' | 'superstar'
type SubscriptionStatus = 'active' | 'cancelled' | 'past_due'
type AiRole = 'user' | 'assistant'
type OpportunityType = 'playlist_submission' | 'sync_brief' | 'blog_feature' | 'show_opening' | 'grant'
```

**Key Interfaces:**

**Profile**
- id, artist_name, real_name, bio, genre[], location
- profile_photo_url, banner_photo_url, slug, subscription_tier
- goals (jsonb), onboarding_completed, created_at, updated_at

**Link**
- id, profile_id, platform, label, url, icon, display_order
- is_visible, click_count, created_at, updated_at

**Track**
- id, profile_id, title, cover_art_url, audio_preview_url, streaming_url
- release_date (text 'YYYY-MM-DD'), genre, mood[], tempo
- is_featured, is_on_epk, play_count, created_at

**Show**
- id, profile_id, venue_name, city, date (text 'YYYY-MM-DD'), ticket_url
- is_headline, is_visible, created_at

**Epk**
- id, profile_id, headline, bio_override, selected_track_ids[], press_photos[]
- stats_snapshot (jsonb), custom_sections (jsonb), view_count, last_generated_at, created_at, updated_at

**AiBriefing**
- id, profile_id, content, opportunities (jsonb), tasks (jsonb), insights (jsonb)
- generated_at, is_read, created_at

**Visit** (tracking)
- id, profile_id, link_id, source ('tiktok'|'instagram'|'youtube'|'direct')
- device ('ios'|'android'|'desktop'), referrer, preferred_platform, visitor_token, created_at

**Event** (tracking)
- id, visit_id, profile_id, link_id, event_type, metadata (jsonb), created_at

---

## 11. SUPABASE EDGE FUNCTIONS

### **track-page-event** (`supabase/functions/track-page-event/index.ts`)

TypeScript/Deno function. Handles 3 operations:

1. **create_visit** — Creates a visit record
   - Inputs: profile_id, link_id, source, device, preferred_platform, visitor_token
   - Detects device from User-Agent (ios/android/desktop)
   - Source validated against whitelist (tiktok, instagram, youtube, direct)
   - Returns: `{ ok: true, visit_id }`

2. **track_event** — Logs event within a visit
   - Inputs: visit_id, event_type, metadata (optional), profile_id, link_id
   - Stores event in events table with metadata

3. **update_visit_preference** — Updates preferred_platform on visit
   - Inputs: visit_id, preferred_platform
   - Used to track user's streaming preference

**Error Handling:** Always returns 200 OK to avoid breaking user experience. CORS headers included.

---

### **suggest-epk-headline** (`supabase/functions/suggest-epk-headline/index.ts`)

TypeScript/Deno function. Calls Claude Haiku API to generate EPK headline.

- **Auth:** Requires bearer token (user session JWT)
- **Fetches:** User profile (artist_name, genre, location, bio, goals)
- **Prompt:** Asks Claude to write a 1-2 sentence press-ready headline
- **Model:** claude-haiku-4-5-20251001
- **Max tokens:** 120
- **Returns:** `{ headline: "..." }`
- **Requires:** `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` secret set in Supabase Dashboard

---

## 12. MIGRATIONS (`supabase/migrations/`)

**Files (8 total):**

1. **20250226000000_profiles_table_and_trigger.sql** — Initial profiles table + handle_new_user trigger
2. **20250226000001_fix_trigger_artist_name_slug.sql** — Fix slug generation in trigger
3. **20250225000000_fix_handle_new_user_trigger.sql** — Earlier trigger fix
4. **20250303000000_add_slug_unique_constraint.sql** — Partial unique index on slug (per user)
5. **20250303000001_create_links_table.sql** — Links table
6. **20250312000000_epk_tracks_shows_policies.sql** — RLS policies (deprecated, use master schema)
7. **20250312000001_master_schema.sql** — **MASTER MIGRATION** (see below)
8. **20260326000000_add_visits_and_events_tracking.sql** — Visits + events tables for link tracking

---

### **MASTER MIGRATION** (20250312000001_master_schema.sql)

**Single source of truth for all DB schema.** Safe to run on fresh or existing projects (all idempotent).

**Covers:**
- Enum types (subscription_tier as text with CHECK)
- All table definitions: profiles, links, tracks, shows, epk, ai_briefings, visits, events
- Indexes
- `updated_at` auto-trigger (via set_updated_at function)
- `handle_new_user` trigger (creates profile + epk rows on signup)
- Row Level Security (all tables, all policies)
- Storage buckets: profile-assets, press-photos, epk-pdfs, track-previews (owner upload + public read)

**Key fixes vs earlier migrations:**
- Creates tracks, shows, epk tables (earlier migration only had RLS without CREATE TABLE)
- handle_new_user now creates epk row on signup
- Adds updated_at auto-trigger
- Defines all storage buckets with proper policies
- Cleans up legacy policy names

---

### **Visits/Events Migration** (20260326000000_add_visits_and_events_tracking.sql)

Creates visits + events tables for link tracking:
- visits: profile_id, link_id, source (tiktok/instagram/youtube/direct), device (ios/android/desktop), referrer, preferred_platform, visitor_token, created_at
- events: visit_id, profile_id, link_id, event_type, metadata (jsonb), created_at
- Indexes on (profile_id, created_at), (source, created_at), etc.
- RLS policies: owners can read their own visits/events

---

## 13. STORAGE BUCKETS (all public)

All defined in master schema. Owner upload + public read policies.

- **profile-assets** — Profile photos at `{userId}/profile.{ext}`
- **press-photos** — EPK press photos at `{userId}/photo-{index}.{ext}` (up to 6)
- **epk-pdfs** — Future: PDF export of EPK
- **track-previews** — Future: audio previews

---

## 14. SUBSCRIPTION TIERS

Stored as text in `profiles.subscription_tier`:
- `free` — baseline features
- `rising` — early paid tier
- `indie` — standard paid
- `superstar` — premium tier

Upgrade logic handled externally (Stripe webhooks → DB update).

---

## 15. KEY PATTERNS & CONVENTIONS

### **Link Mutation Pattern**
All link mutations (PageEditor, EditProfile, Onboarding) follow:
1. DELETE all links for user
2. INSERT current set

No incremental update path. Same for tracks, shows.

### **Slug Generation**
- Base slug: `toBaseSlug(artistName)` — lowercase, hyphenated, alphanumeric
- On save: optionally generate unique slug if collision detected
- Stored on profiles row

### **Photo Upload**
- Path: `{bucket}/{userId}/{type}.{ext}` with `upsert: true`
- Immediate public URL via `getPublicUrl(path)`
- No image resizing (frontend handles display sizing)

### **State Management**
- useAuth hook is single source of truth for session + profile
- Pages own their local form state
- `refreshProfile()` called after mutations that affect profile table
- No global state manager (just React hooks)

### **Error Handling**
- Auth pages show error messages from Supabase
- Tracking function always returns 200 OK (never breaks UX)
- Form validation before save (client-side only)

### **Tracking Pattern** (ArtistPage)
- Visit created on page load (with source param, device, visitor token)
- Events logged for link clicks + other actions
- Preferred platform tracked to understand user intent
- localStorage used for visitor token persistence (15-second cache)

---

## 16. MISSING / FUTURE

- **Tests** — no test framework configured
- **Analytics dashboard** — UI placeholder only
- **AI daily briefing** — `generate-daily-briefing` function not yet deployed
- **Spotify OAuth** — not yet integrated
- **PDF export** — epk-pdfs bucket defined but no export function
- **Generated TypeScript types** — still using manual types; can run `npx supabase gen types typescript` to generate

---

## 17. ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES

**.env.local** (not in repo):
```
VITE_SUPABASE_URL=...
VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=...
```

**Supabase Dashboard Secrets** (to set):
- `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` — for suggest-epk-headline edge function

---

## 18. BUILD & DEV COMMANDS

```bash
npm run dev        # Start Vite dev server
npm run build      # tsc -b && vite build (type check + production build)
npm run lint       # ESLint
npm run preview    # Preview production build locally

# Generate Supabase types:
npx supabase gen types typescript --project-id nerzwarajaprnbcprpfc > src/types/database.generated.ts
```

---

## SUMMARY

This is a well-structured, modular React/TypeScript app with:
- Clear separation of concerns (pages, components, hooks, lib)
- Strong typing discipline (strict TypeScript, manual types for DB)
- Mobile-first design system (Tailwind v4 with CSS custom properties)
- Supabase-first backend (auth, DB, storage, edge functions)
- Clean routing with guards (protected routes, onboarding gate)
- Analytics/tracking infrastructure for link clicks (visits + events tables)
- EPK + artist page features mostly complete
- AI integration ready (Claude edge function for headline generation)

The codebase is in a **Phase 3+ state**: onboarding, artist page, EPK editor/viewer, and link tracking are production-ready. Next phases focus on analytics dashboard, AI daily briefing, and Spotify OAuth.
